name: Beaded Ceramic Planter Ivory - Threshold™
description:
Elegantly display your favorite plants with this Beaded Ceramic Planter from Threshold™. Made of ceramic, this ivory planter features beaded detailing on the rim and ribbed edges for a sophisticated touch. Plus, it has a single drainage hole to remove excess water from the soil of any houseplant.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
